title: lonchocarpus constrictus
intro: Lonchocarpus constrictus, also known as the "Nicker Bean" or "False Jicama", is a plant species native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Lonchocarpus constrictus is often used as a root decoction or infusion, and its seeds are sometimes used to make a medicinal oil.
